mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (name, gender, age, class_id, phone, email, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{classId}, #{phone}, #{email}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, gender, age, class_id, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM student
SELECT id, name, gender, age, class_id, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM student WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, gender, age, class_id, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM student WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT id, name, gender, age, class_id, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM student WHERE class_id = #{classId}
SELECT id, name, gender, age, class_id, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM student WHERE gender = #{gender}

SELECT s.id, s.name, s.gender, s.age, s.class_id, s.phone, s.email, s.create_time, s.update_time, cr.name AS className, cr.grade, cr.major, cr.homeroom_teacher_id AS homeroomTeacherId FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_room cr ON s.class_id = cr.id WHERE s.id = #{studentId}

SELECT s.id, s.name, s.gender, s.age, s.class_id, s.phone, s.email, s.create_time, s.update_time, cr.name AS className, cr.grade, cr.major, cr.homeroom_teacher_id AS homeroomTeacherId FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_room cr ON s.class_id = cr.id WHERE s.class_id = #{classId}

SELECT s.id, s.name, s.gender, s.age, s.class_id, s.phone, s.email, s.create_time, s.update_time, cr.name AS className, cr.grade, cr.major, cr.homeroom_teacher_id AS homeroomTeacherId FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_room cr ON s.class_id = cr.id

SELECT sc.id AS scoreId, sc.score, sc.exam_type, sc.create_time AS scoreCreateTime, c.id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, c.credit, c.hours, c.semester FROM score sc INNER JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY sc.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT course_id) FROM score WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
